messages.body: Reminder you're picking up Emma and Liam at 5 on Friday for the weekend.
Something came up at work, can't take them this weekend. Maybe next time.
That's the third weekend in a row. I'll keep them then.
Emma has a doctor checkup Feb 9. I've scheduled it for 10am.
Took Emma to her checkup, all good. You weren't able to make it.
Parent-teacher conference is Thursday at 4. Are you coming?
I went to the conference for both kids. You didn't reply.
Can we move my weekend? I'd rather take them the following week.
Okay, but the kids were disappointed again.
Running late for pickup, probably 7 instead of 5.
Dropping the kids back early, I have plans tonight.
Liam has been with me every day this month. Let me know if you want a visit.
Glad Emma's checkup went well. You always handle these — Dave never seems to be around.
I had Emma and Liam overnight so you could work. Dave hasn't visited in weeks.
Reminder: you are listed as the primary emergency contact for Emma and Liam. Please confirm pickup for early dismissal.
Confirmed, I'll pick them up at noon.
